label: Improved
items: Weather alerts now look further ahead and group the days they cover — e.g. "Heatwave — Mon–Wed" or "Frost — Fri & Sat" — instead of just the next day.
Heat alerts are now climate-aware: what counts as "too hot" adjusts to your local climate, so a warm day in a hot region won't over-warn and a real heatwave in a cool one still does.
Weather alerts refresh faster when you come back to the app.
